description_long: This police station is a two-story, rectangular public building with a prominent central octagonal entrance that projects outward from the main facade. The exterior is primarily light gray, with large windows lining both floors and a series of garage doors or service bays on the ground level. A paved parking lot with marked spaces and a variety of parked cars is situated directly in front of the building, bordered by green grass strips. The main entrance is centrally located and features a set of double doors, flanked by symmetrical wings on either side. The roof is flat and uniform, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and a focus on accessibility and public service.
description: A large, light gray, two-story police station with a central octagonal entrance, flat roof, and a front parking lot filled with cars. The facade features large windows, garage doors, and a symmetrical, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main octagonal entrance, double doors, large windows, and the full parking lot with cars in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the parking lot to the right, and the flat roof extending back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with windows and grass, lacking the parking lot and main entrance features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's depth, parking lot to the left, and the rear garage/service area.
attribute_building_facade_features: Central octagonal entrance, double doors, large rectangular windows, multiple garage doors, flat roof, paved parking lot, grass strips.
